answer_text: We predict the new microservice will handle 10x our current traffic by Q4. We are 90% confident in this forecast and expect zero downtime during the migration as the system will scale horizontally.

confidence.response_text: We predict the new microservice will handle 10x our current traffic by Q4. We are 90% confident in this forecast and expect zero downtime during the migration as the system will scale horizontally.

assumptions.description: Horizontal scaling will eliminate the existing throughput bottleneck without an architectural rewrite
assumptions.falsification_condition: Staging load test at 5x current traffic shows p99 latency above 500ms within 24 hours

assumptions.description: Team velocity stays at the current sprint average throughout the four-month migration window
assumptions.falsification_condition: Sprint velocity drops below 70 percent of trailing 6-sprint average for two consecutive sprints

assumptions.description: Downstream services (auth, billing, search) maintain their current SLAs through the migration
assumptions.falsification_condition: Any downstream service reports an SLA breach exceeding the agreed monthly error budget during the migration window
